headline: KLA (KLAC) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: At this time, I would like to welcome everyone to the KLA Corporation's September Quarter 2024 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast.  Kevin Kessel: Welcome to our earnings call to discuss the September 2024 results and the December quarter outlook.  KLA's IR website also contains future investor events presentations, corporate governance information and links to our SEC filings, including the most recent annual report and quarterly reports on Forms 10-K and 10-Q.
